title: cheiropleuria integrifolia
intro: Cheiropleuria integrifolia, also known as the integrated lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Cheiropleuriaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheiropleuria integrifolia include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as having potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Cheiropleuria integrifolia is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of dried leaves or capsules in herbal preparations.
